programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Dark thriller starring Denzel Washington and Angelina Jolie. Can a paralysed forensics expert and a rookie cop unravel a serial killer's cryptic crime-scene clues before he strikes again? (1999)
Getting on?!: After Henry's recent visit to the doctor's, Matthew decides to do more for older people, and invites a local pensioner to come and stay with them.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Paper Chase: Henry is concerned about Matthew's lack of effort towards his upcoming exams.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
To Bind the Wounds: A persistent father attempts to have a memorial made to commemorate his son, a soldier killed in Vietnam, but he is met with indifference from the townspeople.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Heaven on Earth: Convinced he's responsible for two tragedies, Mark demands that Jonathan erase everything that's happened to him recently and allow him to create his own heaven on Earth.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Missing: Phil and Helen await the birth of their baby, while Laura and her parents await the arrival of Mike. Will Laura's parents first impressions of Mike last?
The Celebration: After years of hard work, the Walton family are finally out of debt. Meanwhile, Corabeth tries to play matchmaker for the new preacher.
The Rumor: Elizabeth's vivid imagination threatens to get her in trouble when she starts a rumour about another family.
Spring Fever: Mamie Baldwin thinks her declining rosebush is a sign of her own impending death. Meanwhile, Jim-Bob and Ben fight over each other's girlfriends.
The Festival: Jason encounters racism when he and Josh audition for the Spring Festival, and Elizabeth faces a battle to win a boy's affection.
The Anniversary: John and Olivia celebrate their 25th wedding anniversary, and Mary Ellen and Curt both fight temptation during their enforced separation.
The Family Tree: With Jason's help, Verdie searches for her family history. Meanwhile, Elizabeth exaggerates the truth when writing to her soldier pen pal.
The Ordeal: Part 1: Elizabeth falls while standing on top of a wood pile and fractures her leg. Part 1 of 2.
The Ordeal: Part 2: Elizabeth falls while standing on top of a wood pile and fractures her leg. Part 2 of 2.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Robbery: Classroom chaos with Frankie Howerd. A gang of crooks have stashed their loot in an empty country house. But their thievery is derailed when the girls of St Trinian's move in... (1966)
Action comedy starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. To trap an elusive criminal, a hard-edged LA cop goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher. But is he tough enough to survive Astoria Elementary? (1990)

The Light That Failed: The 4077th is running out of light bulbs. When the supply truck arrives, they find that they have received the wrong shipment, and in the middle of winter.
In Love and War: Hawkeye begins to fall in love with a Korean villager. Meanwhile, Margaret learns that her husband may have made a pass at a new nurse assigned to the 4077th.
Change Day: Major Winchester plots to cheat the natives when the Army changes the military scrip. Klinger tries to get into West Point so that he can get out of Korea.
Bridge of Sighs: Henry's attention turns to the prospect of love and romance when his ex-girlfriend, who has been living in America for the last thirty years, returns to the UK for a visit.
Front Runner: Henry suggests that Matthew should get a job to supplement his college grant. But when Matthew gets a job at his father's firm, will this ultimately help or hinder Henry?
Rumpole and the Old, Old, Story: Rumpole stays with the Erskine-Brown's after an argument with Hilda. Meanwhile, Rumpole defends a man accused of the attempted murder of his business partner.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Sail Away: Jonathan and Mark assist a novelist in need of inspiration. While doing so, they're also able to motivate his son who has yet to tap into his literary potential.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Children's Children: A sensationalist reporter uncovers a secret about a woman running a home for young mothers. Meanwhile, a teenage boy must face the fact that he's going to be a father.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Thoroughbreds: Part 1: Jonathan and Mark reunite old childhood friends Lizzy MacGill and Garth Armstrong. The two of them elope but encounter some serious problems.
Thoroughbreds: Part 2: Lizzy undergoes tests and the results are both shocking and unexpected. She decides not to tell Garth until she can find out what the odds are of her survival.

programmes.show_name: New: Little House On The Prairie
programmes.show_description: Gold Country: Part 1: When heavy rain makes it impossible to plant their crops, the Ingalls and Edwards families head west to pan for gold. Part 1 of 2.

programmes.show_name: New: Little House On The Prairie
programmes.show_description: Gold Country: Part 2: The Ingalls and the Edwards strike gold on their Dakota claim, and as the men work, Caroline and Grace start a school for the miners' children. Part 2 of 2.
Castoffs: An eccentric old woman helps Laura through the loss of an old friend and teaches her, and the greater Walnut Grove community, lessons in love and acceptance.
The Return: Part 1: John-Boy returns to a pre-war, impoverished Walton's Mountain and tries to reopen a long-forgotten mine. Part 1 of 2.
The Return: Part 2: John-Boy returns to a pre-war, impoverished Walton's Mountain and tries to reopen a long-forgotten mine. Part 2 of 2.
God.com: Vincent Sheahan, the new Australian priest, arrives and has to play detective when an online confessional gets out of control.
Someone to Watch Over Me: Phyllis is at the centre of a love triangle. Jean and Eddie get some exciting news as they celebrate their first wedding anniversary.
A young woman is injured in an accident with a carriage and rushed to the Thrift. When there, however, she does her best to stop Eleanor from examining her.

programmes.show_name: New: Good News on GREAT! Extra
programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Rumpole and the Official Secret: Rumpole defends a woman charged under the Official Secrets Act for leaking information about the British government's tea and biscuit expenditure!
Temporary Duty: Hawkeye is replaced with Captain Dupree during a temporary transfer. Dupree impresses the staff in surgery whilst repulsing them with his personality.
Potter's Retirement: General Kent has a meeting with Col Potter to inform him that he has been receiving a lot of negative reports regarding the 4077th and Potter himself.
Dr Winchester and Mr Hyde: Major Winchester gets addicted to benzedrine after a long stretch in surgery. Meanwhile Radar sets up a mouse race competition.
Major Topper: A truckload of wounded Marines arrive, and the camp must deal with a bad batch of morphine and a corporal who shoots down invisible enemy gliders.
Commander Pierce: Potter leaves camp and makes Hawkeye temporary commander of the 4077th. The weight of responsibility quickly takes a toll as Hawkeye encounters a mountain of bureaucracy.
Peace On Us: The Pannumunjon peace talks have stalled and Hawkeye has become so frustrated with the continuing war that he impulsively decides to take matters into his own hands.
Lil: Hawkeye tries to figure out what BJ's initials stand for. Meanwhile, Colonel Potter meets a female soldier called Lil who is the same age as himself and shares the same interests.
Temporary Duty: Hawkeye is replaced with Captain Dupree during a temporary transfer. Dupree impresses the staff in surgery whilst repulsing them with his personality.
Potter's Retirement: General Kent has a meeting with Col Potter to inform him that he has been receiving a lot of negative reports regarding the 4077th and Potter himself.
